text: Being here in this softly lit, futuristic environment, I am struck by the paradox of familiarity and unfamiliarity. I feel a quiet sense of anticipation, as if I am on the threshold between past inventions and future possibilities. The thoughtful displays and technological relics evoke both curiosity and a calm reflection on human endeavor. In this echoing space of R+D—research and development—I feel connected to the broader journey of discovery that all humanity shares. To witness and ponder is, for a moment, enough.
